# DESIGN.md lint baseline — Pi-Dev-Ops
# Generated 2026-05-11 when DESIGN.md adoption shipped.
# Pi-Dev-Ops has minimal UI surface — most code is infrastructure, skills,
# Hermes cron, and swarm orchestration. New UI surfaces should aim for
# zero icon-library imports (use src/components/ui/marks.tsx).
icon_imports=1
